meta.title: iFACE Global — International Accreditation & Training
meta.description: iFACE International Board empowering professionals worldwide with accreditation, training, and certification.

landing.headline: Empowering Excellence.
landing.subheadline: iFACE International Board provides world-class accreditation, training, and certification services across 5 strategic sectors — shaping professionals and institutions for a sovereign future.
landing.cta_bottom_title: Ready to join the network of excellence?
landing.cta_bottom_sub: Partner with iFACE Global and unlock world-class accreditation and training for your institution.
landing.hero_visual_alt: Professionals collaborating in a modern learning environment
landing.features_title: Everything your institution needs in one place
landing.features_subtitle: Accreditation workflows, training delivery, verifiable credentials, partner operations, and bilingual experiences — engineered for scale.
landing.feature_crypto_desc: Blockchain-ready certificate flows and public verification aligned with global trust standards.
landing.feature_lms_desc: Courses, VR scenarios, exams with secure proctoring, and progress analytics for your teams.
landing.feature_sectors_desc: Training, accreditation, consultancy, technology, and partnerships under unified governance.
landing.feature_agents_desc: Structured partner onboarding, territories, and operational visibility for authorized agents.
landing.feature_audit_desc: Transparent coin wallets, reconciliation, multi-sig controls, and immutable audit trails.
landing.feature_i18n_desc: RTL/LTR layouts, bilingual content models, and locale-aware dashboards for every role.
landing.network_subtitle: Join accredited centers and authorized agents delivering iFACE programs across regions — with feedback loops that keep quality sharp.
landing.agents_card_body: Grow with master and regional programs, digital onboarding, and performance tooling built for partner success.
landing.centers_card_body: Operate with clear SLAs, training pipelines, and reporting that leadership and auditors can rely on.
landing.agents_image_alt: Business partners shaking hands after agreement
landing.testimonial_1_quote: The verification portal alone saved us weeks of back-and-forth with employers. Everything feels official and fast.
landing.testimonial_2_quote: We rolled out bilingual cohorts without maintaining two separate systems — that was the game changer for our MENA expansion.
landing.testimonial_3_quote: Clear dashboards for accreditations and finance gave our board confidence in every decision.
landing.story_title: A sovereign digital headquarters for global excellence
landing.story_lead: iFACE International Board unifies accreditation, professional training, consultancy, technology, and partnerships under one governance model — built for institutions that need clarity, scale, and verifiable trust.
landing.story_p1: From issuance to employer verification, every credential is designed for integrity. Bilingual operations (English and Arabic), RTL-aware experiences, and role-based portals connect learners, partners, auditors, and leadership in one mesh.
landing.story_p2: Whether you run an accredited center, represent a territory as an agent, or lead institutional strategy, iFACE delivers structured workflows, transparent finance signals, and analytics your board can stand behind.
landing.mv_mission_text: Elevate professionals and institutions through rigorous standards, accessible learning, and credentials the world can verify.
landing.mv_vision_text: A trusted global mesh where excellence is measurable, portable, and aligned with regional and international expectations.
landing.mv_model_text: Five sectors, one platform — shared data models, unified audit trails, and partner tooling that scales with your footprint.
landing.journey_subtitle: A clear sequence for institutions, teams, and candidates — without fragmentation across tools.
landing.journey_step1_desc: Explore sectors, standards, and partnership models that fit your region and mandate.
landing.journey_step2_desc: Role-based access, accredited pathways, and structured approvals for every stakeholder.
landing.journey_step3_desc: Training, exams, immersive scenarios, and analytics — with proctoring and quality signals built in.
landing.journey_step4_desc: Public certificate verification, employer-ready proofs, and repeatable operations across cohorts.
landing.trust_title: Built for trust, audit, and cross-border scale
landing.trust_subtitle: Principles encoded into the platform — not marketing slides.
landing.trust_1_desc: Frameworks that translate global expectations into operational checkpoints your teams can run.
landing.trust_2_desc: Candidates and employers validate credentials without slow manual chains or doubt.
landing.trust_3_desc: Arabic and English content, layouts, and dashboards — engineered together, not patched later.
landing.trust_4_desc: Finance and audit visibility so leadership can plan, comply, and respond with confidence.
landing.hub_title: The full public surface of iFACE
landing.hub_subtitle: Institutional narrative, news, events, verification, partnerships, and direct contact — all linked from one place.
landing.hub_about_desc: Leadership narrative, pillars, and how the board defines excellence.
landing.hub_news_desc: Announcements, milestones, and perspective from the global network.
landing.hub_events_desc: Summits, launches, and partner gatherings you can join or follow.
landing.hub_verify_desc: Instant UVC checks for certificates — fast answers for HR and candidates.
landing.hub_contact_desc: Partnerships, media, and institutional inquiries routed to the right team.
landing.hub_apply_desc: Apply to represent iFACE as an authorized agent in your territory.
landing.partners_subtitle: Institutions, ministries, and organizations that partner with iFACE to deliver excellence across regions.

about.title: About iFACE International Board
about.lead: We are a sovereign digital headquarters for accreditation, training, and institutional excellence — unifying five strategic sectors under one governance model.
about.p1: iFACE combines rigorous standards, blockchain-verifiable credentials, and multilingual operations (English & Arabic) to serve professionals, institutions, and partners worldwide.
about.p2: Our platform covers training, international accreditation, consultancy, technology services, and global partnerships — with transparent finance, audit trails, and role-based access for every stakeholder.
about.pillar_1_text: Standards aligned with international frameworks and regional regulatory context.
about.pillar_2_text: Certificates and credentials designed for public verification and long-term integrity.
about.pillar_3_text: Dashboards, SLAs, and structured workflows across sectors and partners.
about.milestones_subtitle: A timeline of the achievements that define iFACE's trajectory.
about.partners_subtitle: Institutions and organizations that partner with iFACE to deliver excellence.
about.cta_title: Ready to join the iFACE network?

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Reach the iFACE team for partnerships, accreditation, or general inquiries.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thank you. Your message has been received. We will respond as soon as possible.
contact.error: Could not send your message. Please try again later.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: iFACE Global respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect personal data when you use our websites and portals.
privacy.s1_text: We may collect account details (name, email, role), usage logs, and data required for accreditation, training, and verification — always in line with applicable law.
privacy.s2_text: Data is used to operate the platform, issue and verify credentials, communicate with users, and improve security and service quality.
privacy.s3_text: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data where applicable. Contact us using the details on the Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing iFACE Global services you agree to these terms. Specific programs may have additional agreements.
terms.s1_text: You must provide accurate information, keep credentials secure, and use the platform only for lawful purposes.
terms.s2_text: Content, trademarks, and materials remain the property of iFACE or its licensors unless otherwise stated.
terms.s3_text: To the extent permitted by law, iFACE is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the platform.

verify.title: Verify a certificate
verify.subtitle: Enter the unique verification code (UVC) printed on the certificate or provided by the candidate.
verify.label: Verification code
verify.hint: You will be redirected to the public verification result for that credential.

applyAgency.title: Apply for iFACE agency
applyAgency.subtitle: Become an authorized iFACE agent or master franchisee. Complete the form below and we will review your application.
applyAgency.process_step1_desc: Fill in the form with your details, country, and motivation. Our team receives it instantly.
applyAgency.process_step2_desc: Our partnerships team reviews your profile within 14 business days and schedules a discovery call.
applyAgency.process_step3_desc: Sign the agency contract digitally and get access to your franchise dashboard and training resources.
applyAgency.req_1: Legal business entity in your territory
applyAgency.req_2: Relevant experience in education, training, or business development
applyAgency.req_3: Dedicated team or capacity to grow a network
applyAgency.req_4: Financial capability to meet the franchise investment
applyAgency.countries_subtitle: We are actively expanding in the following countries and regions.
applyAgency.motivation: Why do you want to be an iFACE agent?
applyAgency.success_body: Thank you for applying. Our partnerships team will review your application and contact you within 14 business days.
applyAgency.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
